name: XPG Core Reactor II VE 750W ATX 3.0 80 Plus Gold ATX Fully Modular Power Supply
highlights: XPG CORE REACTOR II VE empowers your system with efficient power delivery. It’s compatible with Intel’s latest ATX 3.1 design guidelines and has a dedicated 12V-2×6 connector for the latest graphics cards. This unit boasts a DC-DC circuit design for enhanced performance, stability, and consistency, with exceptional ripple control and hold-up time surpassing Intel’s specifications. It has 8 industrial protections fortifying its durability, safeguarding both the unit and your system.
